---
title: "2012_pluck_cleaning"
format: html
author: Savannah Kjaer
date: 04-15-2026
---

## Set up

### load packages

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(readr)
library(readxl)
library(here)
library(janitor)
```

## Aboveground

### read in data

```{r, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
# read in files from /raw_data/ folder
df <- read_excel("~/LTER-pluck/2012_pluck/raw_data/2012lg06ttbiomass Sep23.xlsx", sheet = 2, col_types = c("date", "text", "text", "text", "text", "text", "text", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric",
"numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric",
"numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric",
"numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric", "numeric"))
#315 of 27 variables
# by defining as numeric it forced text "NA" to become true NA

```

### tidy columns and rows

```{r}
# clean names, remove spaces, etc
df <- clean_names(df)

# remove unwanted columns
colnames(df)

# remove calculations from raw data
df1 <- select(df, -c("average_g_quad", "std_err", "count", "average_g_m2", "std_err_g_m2"))
#315 of 22
```

### longform

```{r}
# wide2long
head(df1)
df2 <- df1 %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(8:22),
               names_to = "block_quad",
               values_to = "mass_g")
#4725 of 9

head(df2)
```

### create block and quad column

```{r}
# create block column
df3 <- df2 %>% mutate(block = case_when(
    startsWith(block_quad, "b1") ~ "1",
    startsWith(block_quad, "b2") ~ "2",
    startsWith(block_quad, "b3") ~ "3",
    startsWith(block_quad, "b4") ~ "4"
    ))
#of 10

# create quad column
df4 <- df3 %>% mutate(quad = case_when(
    endsWith(block_quad, "q1") ~ "1",
    endsWith(block_quad, "q2") ~ "2",
    endsWith(block_quad, "q3") ~ "3",
    endsWith(block_quad, "q4") ~ "4",
    endsWith(block_quad, "q5") ~ "5"
    ))
#of 11

# remove block_quad column
df5 <- select(df4, -c("block_quad"))
#of 10
```

### normalize with 2024 pluck

```{r}
unique(df5$site)

df5$site <- df5$site %>% 
  recode("LTER 2006 Low Nutrient Moist Acidic Tussock Tundra" = "MAT06")
```

### final tidy

```{r}
col_order <- c("date", "site", "block", "treatment", "quad", "species", "tissue", "biomass_category", "growth_form", "mass_g")
df5 <- df5[, col_order]
```

### write final_data/ag_mass.csv

```{r}
view(df5)
#4725 of 10

write.csv(df5, "~/LTER-pluck/2012_pluck/processed_data/final_data/ag_mass2012.csv", row.names=FALSE)
```
